Hero.h1: We build cloud-native platforms. And we run them.
Hero.sub: Todea is a Seoul-based engineering team helping enterprises across the Americas, Europe, and Asia-Pacific design, build, and operate production-grade cloud-native infrastructure.

Services.label: (1.0) Services
Services.desc: Five ways we help engineering teams ship production-grade infrastructure, from architecture through day-two operations.
Services.s1_d: Internal developer platforms your engineers actually want to use. Secure, observable, production-ready.
Services.s3_d: Full-stack visibility into production. Know what's happening before your users do.
Services.s4_d: From on-prem to cloud native. Every workload migrated, validated, and ready to scale.
Services.s5_d: Zero-trust, workload identity, and compliance baked into the platform, not bolted on.
Services.s6_d: We don't just build. We operate. 24/7 platform management, on-call coverage, and continuous improvement, so your team can focus on your product.

Approach.label: (2.0) Approach
Approach.desc: We work alongside your engineers to understand your constraints, your stack, and your goals. Every engagement produces working infrastructure.
Approach.step1_d: Deep-dive into your architecture, operational practices, and business requirements.
Approach.step2_d: Design a target state that balances reliability, security, and operational simplicity.
Approach.step3_d: Build alongside your engineers with IaC, GitOps pipelines, and version-controlled deployments.
Approach.step4_d: Production readiness reviews, runbooks, and monitoring. We stay on as your operations team, or hand off cleanly when you're ready.

TechStack.label: (3.0) Expertise
TechStack.title: Battle-tested across the cloud-native stack.
TechStack.subtitle: Every tool shown here, we've shipped to production. From Kubernetes orchestration to zero-trust service mesh.

Contact.label: (4.0) Contact
Contact.desc: Whether you're planning a migration, improving observability, or building a platform from scratch.

CookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies for analytics.
